tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_1: Large content-storage block: each vault adds 243 slots
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_2: Adjacent vaults automatically merge into one vault network with no hardcoded cap
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_3: Right click to open; toggle chunk loading from the terminal screen
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_vault_ex: Use on a Nihility Vault: adds 243 slots per upgrade, up to 3 upgrades per vault
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Curios accessory: creates a moving light source around you and maintains night vision
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Curios accessory: automatically grants recovery and absorption when health is low
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_shadow_s: Consumed on use: brief invisibility, speed, and slow falling to escape danger
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_purifyin: Uses durability: clears common negative effects and grants brief regeneration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Uses durability: improves vision and marks nearby living beings with glow
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Uses durability: brief resistance, fire resistance, and absorption shield
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_phase_fe: Uses durability: brief speed, jump boost, and slow falling for traversal
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_gravity_: Uses durability: pulls nearby non-player creatures and applies debuffs
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_war_horn: Uses durability: empowers you and weakens nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_soul_fla: Consumed on use: restores health and grants brief regeneration and absorption
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_null_scr: Consumed on use: clears harmful effects and grants brief resistance and fire resistance
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_stasis_w: Uses durability: creates a stasis field that heavily slows nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_rift_sna: Uses durability: pulls and marks nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_abyssal_: Uses durability: empowers you and weakens nearby enemies
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_void_bea: Uses durability: grants exploration buffs and marks distant creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_terminal: Curios terminal: equip in common Curios slots and press O to open the bound vault network
Hold it and sneak-right-click a Nihility Vault to bind
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_amulet: Curios necklace: night vision and underwater resilience
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_belt: Curios belt: movement speed and step height
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_cloak: Curios back slot: slow falling and reduced fall damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_magnet: Curios charm: slowly pulls nearby dropped items toward you
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_regenera: Curios ring: slowly heals you when hurt and raises max absorption
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_miner_ch: Curios charm: improves mining efficiency and block break speed
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_ward: Curios charm: armor, knockback resistance, and periodic resistance
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_gauntlet: Curios hands slot: increases attack damage and attack speed for melee combat
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_hourglas: Curios charm/belt: periodically grants haste and speed for smoother exploration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_soul_anc: Curios charm/necklace: when critically hurt, triggers a brief shield, resistance, and recovery
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_rift_rin: Curios ring: attack damage and attack speed for rift melee builds
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_eclipse_: Curios necklace: maintains night vision and grants brief invisibility while sneaking
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_aegis_ch: Curios charm: armor and knockback resistance, with emergency resistance while hurt
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_wayfinde: Curios charm/belt: periodic speed and luck for exploration
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_star_com: Curios charm/necklace: periodically marks nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_crown: Curios head slot: max health and luck, with emergency resistance and recovery
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_abyss_ma: Curios back slot: slow falling, fire resistance, and greatly reduced fall damage
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_siphon_r: Curios ring: attack damage and max absorption, with slow self-healing when hurt
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_pearl_be: Curios belt: movement speed, step height, and periodic jump boost
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_sentinel: Curios charm: periodically marks and weakens nearby non-player creatures
tooltip.templenihility.nihility_trader_s: Curios charm: luck bonus for trading and rare exploration rewards
message.templenihility.nihility_lantern: Nihility lantern lit: night vision and haste granted
message.templenihility.nihility_recovery: Nihility recovery orb released: short protection granted
message.templenihility.nihility_shadow_s: Nihility shadow sigil activated: you fade into the void
message.templenihility.nihility_purifyin: Nihility purifying bell rings: harmful effects fade
message.templenihility.nihility_echo_len: Nihility echo lens opened: nearby beings are marked
message.templenihility.nihility_barrier_: Nihility barrier core deployed: short protection active
message.templenihility.nihility_phase_fe: Nihility phase feather opened: your mobility is briefly enhanced
message.templenihility.nihility_gravity_: Nihility gravity sigil collapsed: nearby creatures are pulled into the echo
message.templenihility.nihility_war_horn: Nihility war horn sounded: battle echoes empower you
message.templenihility.nihility_soul_fla: Nihility soul flask consumed: life flows back
message.templenihility.nihility_null_scr: Null scroll opened: harmful effects are swallowed
message.templenihility.nihility_stasis_w: Nihility stasis watch turned: time thickens nearby
message.templenihility.nihility_rift_sna: Rift snare released: enemies are pulled toward the rift
message.templenihility.nihility_abyssal_: Abyssal drum sounded: nihility battle echoes spread
message.templenihility.nihility_void_bea: Nihility void beacon lit: distant echoes are marked
message.templenihility.item_cooldown: This nihility item is still cooling down
message.templenihility.item_no_targets: No valid targets in range; item was not consumed
message.templenihility.trade_success: Trade complete: paid %s x %s and received %s x %s
message.templenihility.trade_need_more: Not enough materials: this trade needs at least %s x %s
message.templenihility.trade_wrong_item: This nihility creature does not accept that item. Use Nihility Shards or Nihility Crystals.
message.templenihility.trade_cooldown: Trade cooling down: try again in about %s seconds
message.templenihility.terminal_unbound: Terminal is unbound: hold it and sneak-right-click a Nihility Vault
message.templenihility.terminal_missing: You need to carry or wear a Nihility Terminal
message.templenihility.terminal_wrong_di: The bound vault is in another dimension
message.templenihility.vault_not_found: Bound Nihility Vault was not found; it may be unloaded or broken
message.templenihility.vault_chunkload_o: Nihility Vault network chunk loading enabled for %s vaults
Nihility Vault network chunk loading disabled for %s vaults
message.templenihility.vault_upgrade_suc: Nihility Vault expanded: level %s, current capacity %s slots
message.templenihility.vault_upgrade_max: This Nihility Vault is already at the expansion cap: level %s
message.templenihility.help_vault: §7Nihility Vault: right-click a vault to open the terminal. Adjacent vaults merge; each vault adds 243 slots.
message.templenihility.help_terminal: §7Nihility Terminal: hold it and sneak-right-click a vault to bind; then press O or use /nihility terminal.
message.templenihility.help_chunkload: §7Chunk loading: open a Nihility Vault or Terminal, then click the Chunk Load button.
screen.templenihility.vault_stats: Network: %s vaults, %s slots; drag JEI items to search
